case_title: MARINA REYNOSO VS. HENRY CHAVARRIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF MARINA REYNOSO RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYNOSO, MARINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2020 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO MAY-18-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARINA REYNOSO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HENRY CHAVARRIA IS PRESENT. NO INTERPERTERS AVAILABLE FOR BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED FEB-16-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, KAREN CHICAS
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO PROVIDE FOR SPANISH INTERTEPERTER TO MAY 18, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARINA REYNOSO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT HENRY CHAVARRIA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAREN CHICAS ZUNIGA IS NOT PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WOULD HAVE BEEN ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYNOSO, MARINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVARRIA, HENRY ZUNIGA, KAREN CHICAS $38.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $88.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY REYNOSO, MARINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVARRIA, HENRY ZUNIGA, KAREN CHICAS
